interpreted_controls.business_rationale: Failure to implement 'Treasury & Investment Control' creates uncontrolled Financial Risk exposure for the institution. Under RBI's supervisory framework, non-compliance with Treasury requirements can result in regulatory censure, financial penalties, and reputational harm. This control operationalises the institution's commitment to regulatory adherence and risk management.
interpreted_controls.control_summary: [MEDIUM] Treasury & Investment Control — Compliance Control is a operational control supporting the 'Treasury & Investment Control' business capability. Implementation follows the 'Workflow Creation' pattern and is owned by the Risk function. Compliance is verified through manual audit.

interpreted_controls.control_objective: To establish authorised procedures for all applicable Treasury requirements relating to 'Treasury & Investment Control', thereby enabling the institution to demonstrate full regulatory adherence and reduce Financial Risk exposure.
